Output.Comment: A combination of values selected in vdServiceMethod depending on the drop down value dynamically built.

Output.reference: CMAN - CJR009 Detailed Use Case N215 Certificate of Service.doc
Output.Comment: Combination of vdServiceAddress1, vdServiceAddress2, vdServiceAddress3, vdServiceAddress4, vdServiceAddress5, vdServicePostCode into one field. Template formatting to be applied to combine the address lines.

Output.reference: CMAN - CJR030 Detailed Use Case - N20.doc
CMAN - CJR030 Detailed Use Case - N20.doc
CMAN - CJR030 Detailed Use Case - N20.doc
Output.Comment: Why is this variable split into 2 parts? It seems that it includes the name. Should the user not enter data but pick up from Court Table and use vdCourtName here as well.

Output.reference: CMAN - CJR030 Detailed Use Case - N20.doc
Output.Comment:
The database decodes MOD and adds text "and each following day of the hearing until the court tells you that you are no longer required."
What happens for OD?

Output.reference: CMAN - CJR030 Detailed Use Case - N20.doc
Output.Comment: If the witness has any documents we add text on the document. Should we have this as a boolean to inform the template to add extra text.

Output.reference: CMAN - CJR030 Detailed Use Case - N20.doc
Output.Comment: This variable brings back the valid values from the database. Is it a dropdown? It is a description of valid variables. It could be Q&A as well. Or it could be from the subject.

Output.reference: CMAN - CJR030 Detailed Use Case - N20.doc
Output.Comment: These are the people who pick up N243B. The data is already in the database. Is that correct?

Output.reference: CMAN - CJR030 Detailed Use Case - N20.doc
